title: Cohort Builder
description: The Cohort Builder lets you define patient populations using CIRCE expression logic. A cohort definition specifies who qualifies (primary event + inclusion rules) and for how long (exit strategies). Cohorts are the foundation for every analysis in Parthenon.
tips: Start with the Primary Event — this anchors the index date for every qualifying patient.
Inclusion rules are AND-ed together; each rule further filters the cohort population.
Preview the generated SQL (SQL tab) before running generation to catch logic errors early.
Use the Clone button to duplicate a definition when exploring small variations of the same cohort.
Tag your cohorts (e.g. 'T2DM', 'validation') to find them quickly as the library grows.
